subject: chemistry
title: 22M.1.SL.TZ2.24
question_html:
How many dichlorinated butane isomers can be formed by the halogenation of CH3CH2CH2CH3 with excess Cl2 in the presence of UV light?

A.  4

B.  6

C.  8

D.  10
examiners_html: Candidates had to work out the possible number of isomers of dichlorobutane and the majority only thought of 4 of the 6 possible isomers. 32% of the candidates obtained the correct answer.
